title: A little pledge about where to focus
subtitle: A conscious narrowing of attention after a period of drift or expansion.
description: An artifact documenting a deliberate structural narrowing of focus. It marks a course correction from future projections back to immediate reality and responsibility.

motifMap.meaning: A conscious narrowing of attention; leaving only one lit room to remain within.

excerpt: I am pledging to refocus on the important things now. My idea of where I want to go for school has made me lose sight of what matters here. Which is here.

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “A little pledge about where to focus”
